subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! In steadfastness, firmness and constancy in the Covenant of God, thy father hath shown forth a radiance like unto the white hand of Moses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی جناب ابوی در ثبوت و رسوخ و استقامت بر عهد الهی چنان ید بیضاای
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
